features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Implement login, logout, and token refresh using JWT stored in HttpOnly cookies
features.evidence: npm test -- auth.service.spec.ts (12 tests pass), manual sign-in flow confirmed on staging

features.name: Dashboard Layout
features.description: Build responsive dashboard with collapsible sidebar, top nav, and content area using CSS Grid
features.evidence: Vitest: Dashboard.test.tsx (8 tests pass), Storybook: Dashboard and Sidebar stories render, responsive breakpoints verified

features.name: Q&A with Citations
features.description: Allow users to ask questions against uploaded documents and receive answers with inline citation links back to source paragraphs
features.evidence: Document chunking pipeline done. Chunker.test.ts passes. Working on IPC handler between renderer and chunk worker.

features.name: Export to PDF
features.description: Add PDF export for Q&A sessions with embedded citations and metadata header

features.name: Dark Mode
features.description: Add theme toggle with system preference detection and persisted user override
